description.en: Meal Replacement Therapy for healthy weight management. High-protein formula that keeps you full and nourished while reducing calorie intake.
description.sw: Tiba ya Kubadilisha Mlo kwa usimamizi wa uzito wenye afya. Fomula ya protini nyingi inayokufanya ujisikie kamili na kupata lishe huku ukipunguza kalori.

usage.en: Mix 2 scoops with 200ml water or milk. Take once daily as a meal replacement, preferably breakfast or lunch.
usage.sw: Changanya vijiko 2 na maji au maziwa 200ml. Tumia mara moja kwa siku badala ya mlo, ikiwezekana kiamsha kinywa au chakula cha mchana.

description.en: Colon cleansing formula with phytonutrients. Removes toxins and waste, improves digestion, and prepares the body to absorb nutrients efficiently.
description.sw: Fomula ya kusafisha utumbo mkubwa na virutubisho vya mmea. Huondoa sumu na taka, huboresha usagaji wa chakula, na kuandaa mwili kufyonza virutubisho.

usage.en: Mix 1 sachet with 250ml cold water. Drink immediately once daily, best taken in the morning before breakfast.
usage.sw: Changanya kifurushi 1 na maji baridi 250ml. Kunywa mara moja kwa siku, inafaa kunywa asubuhi kabla ya kiamsha kinywa.

description.en: Nature's green miracle — detoxifies, alkalises, and energises your body. Rich in antioxidants and supports healthy blood production.
description.sw: Muujiza wa kijani wa asili — husafisha sumu, hutenganisha asidi, na kutoa nguvu mwilini. Tajiri katika vioksidishaji na inasaidia uzalishaji wa damu.

usage.en: Add 5ml (1 teaspoon) to a glass of water (300ml). Take 1–2 times daily, morning and/or evening.
usage.sw: Ongeza 5ml (kijiko 1) kwenye glasi ya maji (300ml). Tumia mara 1–2 kwa siku, asubuhi na/au jioni.

description.en: Premium blue-green algae superfood packed with proteins, vitamins, and antioxidants. Boosts immunity, energy, and overall vitality.
description.sw: Chakula bora cha mwani wa bluu-kijani kilichojaa protini, vitamini, na vioksidishaji. Huimarisha kinga, nishati, na nguvu ya jumla.

usage.en: Take 3–6 tablets daily with water. Best taken 30 minutes before meals for maximum absorption.
usage.sw: Tumia vidonge 3–6 kwa siku na maji. Inafaa kunywa dakika 30 kabla ya mlo kwa ufyonzaji bora.

description.en: Premium blend with Korean ginseng extract for sustained energy without jitters. Enhances focus, stamina, and mental clarity throughout the day.
description.sw: Mchanganyiko wa hali ya juu na dondoo ya ginseng ya Korea kwa nishati endelevu bila mshtuko. Huimarisha umakini, nguvu, na uwazi wa kiakili.

usage.en: Mix 1 sachet with 150–200ml hot water. Stir well and enjoy. Take 1–2 cups daily, preferably morning and early afternoon.
usage.sw: Changanya kifurushi 1 na maji moto 150–200ml. Koroga vizuri na unywe. Tumia vikombe 1–2 kwa siku, ikiwezekana asubuhi na mchana.

description.en: Three-in-one coffee with ganoderma, ginseng, and tongkat ali. A powerful wellness brew that supports vitality, stamina, and male health.
description.sw: Kahawa ya tatu-kwa-moja na ganoderma, ginseng, na tongkat ali. Kinywaji chenye nguvu kinachosaidia nguvu, stamina, na afya ya kiume.

usage.en: Mix 1 sachet with 150ml hot water. Take 1 cup daily, best in the morning. Do not exceed 2 cups per day.
usage.sw: Changanya kifurushi 1 na maji moto 150ml. Tumia kikombe 1 kwa siku, inafaa asubuhi. Usizidi vikombe 2 kwa siku.

description.en: Collagen-rich chocolate drink for radiant skin, stronger joints, and better sleep. Combines marine collagen with cocoa for a delicious daily ritual.
description.sw: Kinywaji cha chokoleti chenye kolajeni nyingi kwa ngozi yenye kung'aa, viungo imara, na usingizi bora. Inachanganya kolajeni ya baharini na kakao.

usage.en: Mix 1 sachet with 200ml warm water or milk. Take once daily, best in the evening before bed for overnight skin repair.
usage.sw: Changanya kifurushi 1 na maji ya uvuguvugu au maziwa 200ml. Tumia mara moja kwa siku, inafaa jioni kabla ya kulala kwa ukarabati wa ngozi usiku.
